title: Iterate over calldata arrays using pointer arithmetic with shift-based offset computation
trigger_patterns: batch loop over ids and amounts
description: Instead of using Solidity's array indexing (which adds bounds checks and ABI decoding per element), this pattern iterates directly over calldata using pointer arithmetic. shl(5, i) computes i * 32 for the offset into the array. Two parallel arrays (ids and amounts) are traversed simultaneously using the same computed offset, loading elements with calldataload.
when_to_apply: Batch operations iterating over calldata arrays of fixed-size elements
when_not_to_apply: Arrays of dynamic-size elements, memory arrays that need ABI decoding
